title: hieracium eviridatum
intro: Hieracium eviridatum, also known as Hawkweed or Devil's Paintbrush, is a flowering plant in the sunflower family that is native to Europe and Asia. The plant is used medicinally for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to treat wounds, burns, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Hieracium eviridatum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing, making it a useful natural remedy for various health conditions. Herbal preparations of Hieracium eviridatum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
